calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-003 harm latent forward model + reconstruction branch (EXQ-166b)
items.notes: Latent forward model (HarmForwardModel) + HarmDecoder reconstruction branch. Fixes EXQ-166a C2 failure: obs-space diluted harm signal in 51-dim MSE. P0 autoencoder ensures rich z_harm. Phase 1 joint loss: latent prediction + reconstruction prevents identity collapse.
